dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.text: Hej! Jeg hedder Emma. Hvad hedder du?

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Hej Emma. Jeg hedder Clara. Dejligt at møde dig!

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.text: I lige måde! Hvor kommer du fra?

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Jeg kommer fra Tyskland, men jeg bor i Aarhus nu. Hvad med dig?

dialogue.speaker: Emma
dialogue.text: Jeg er fra Odense, og jeg studerer her i byen.

dialogue.speaker: Clara
dialogue.text: Hvor spændende! Vi ses i klassen.

translation.speaker: Emma
translation.text: Hi! My name is Emma. What is your name?

translation.speaker: Clara
translation.text: Hi Emma. My name is Clara. Nice to meet you!

translation.speaker: Emma
translation.text: Likewise! Where do you come from?

translation.speaker: Clara
translation.text: I come from Germany, but I live in Aarhus now. What about you?

translation.speaker: Emma
translation.text: I am from Odense, and I study here in the city.

translation.speaker: Clara
translation.text: How exciting! See you in class.
